special_mechanics.name: Emergency Evasion/Attack Deflector
special_mechanics.description: Replaced the Dodge technique from previous games. Allows player to roll away or towards opponent, with potential to end up on opposite side of opponent.

special_mechanics.name: Variable Jump Height
special_mechanics.description: Player can determine the height of their jumps and perform small or high jumps.

special_mechanics.name: Counter Techniques
special_mechanics.description: Player can perform several counter-techniques to cancel enemies' attacks.

special_mechanics.name: Running
special_mechanics.description: Player can run instead of hopping forward to approach opponent faster.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Source contains gameplay descriptions but no precise physics parameters. Fighting game mechanics documented qualitatively rather than quantitatively.
